description: Use this API to return the number of Time Series Power Flow profile by element name. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr, count = gettspfprofilecountbyelement(element)

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: Name of the element that profiles will be returned. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: count
return_values.description: Number of time series power flow profile that defined for element. (output).
